databrew.dataset.fileslimit.MaxFiles.Description: The number of Amazon S3 files to select.

databrew.dataset.fileslimit.Order.Description: A criteria to use for Amazon S3 files sorting before their selection. By default uses DESCENDING order, i.e. most recent files are selected first. Anotherpossible value is ASCENDING.

databrew.dataset.fileslimit.OrderedBy.Description: A criteria to use for Amazon S3 files sorting before their selection. By default uses LAST_MODIFIED_DATE as a sorting criteria. Currently it's the only allowed value.
